prompt.prompt: The question or task to send to the model
prompt.context: Optional supporting text (code, docs, data) appended to the prompt as a separate block
prompt.role: Optional role slug from config/roles/ to shape model behavior
prompt.maxTokens: Optional max output tokens. Budget for BOTH visible answer and any hidden reasoning: reasoning models spend tokens thinking before emitting text, so a tight ceiling can leave no room for a visible answer. Give reasoning models generous headroom; in multi-round quorum, raise it further since the transcript grows each round.

quorum.models: Two or more selectors: "model" or "model:role". The same model may appear multiple times with different roles (for example "gpt:judge" and "gpt:skeptic"); each selector is a distinct speaker.
quorum.roles: Ad-hoc roles for this quorum call: map of role name to instructions. Reference as "model:role" in models.
quorum.rounds: Discussion rounds (default 1; max set by MAX_ROUNDS)
quorum.mode: How much of the transcript each round speaker sees: sequential (default; sees all prior turns), parallel (sees only completed earlier rounds, blind to same-round peers), private (sees only its own prior turns), independent (sees nothing but the prompt until synthesis).
quorum.synthesize: Selector for a synthesis turn. The synthesizer never speaks in normal rounds — only in its synthesis slot(s).
quorum.synthesizeEvery: When the synthesizer runs (only matters when synthesize is set): a number N synthesizes after every Nth round (and always the last); 1 = every round; 0 = only at the end. "end" is an alias for 0 (the default).
quorum.closingStatements: When true, every round speaker gives one final parallel statement over the whole transcript right before the synthesis. Requires synthesize.
quorum.objectives: Optional per-team objectives for team runs: a map of team tag to that team's shared goal. Tag speakers with model:role@team; each tagged team must have an objective here. Every teammate sees its own team's objective; a synthesizer sees all of them.
quorum.frame: Optional selector for a neutral framer: a chair that opens the discussion (round 1) by setting the stakes and shaping the question. Never takes a side and cannot carry a team tag. Mirror of synthesize (which closes); the framer opens.
quorum.reframeEvery: When the framer re-fires (only matters when frame is set): a number N re-frames every Nth round to steer/redirect; 0 or "end" (default) means opening frame only.
quorum.tokenBudget: Optional SOFT cumulative token budget for the whole run (overrides TOKEN_BUDGET). Sequential mode checks it between turns; parallel mode checks at round boundaries, so a round can overshoot before it trips. Once crossed, remaining turns are skipped gracefully but synthesis still runs. Not a hard cap. See structuredContent.budget.
